taskTemplates.name: SEO audit and remediation brief
taskTemplates.objectiveTemplate: Inspect live state, identify the highest-value SEO issues, and prepare direct repository updates where possible.

taskTemplates.name: Metadata rewrite pack
taskTemplates.objectiveTemplate: Review metadata quality and prepare revised title tags, meta descriptions, and heading recommendations.

taskTemplates.name: Landing-page CTA improvement
taskTemplates.objectiveTemplate: Review the active landing pages and improve CTA clarity, routing, and conversion intent.

taskTemplates.name: Content accuracy review
taskTemplates.objectiveTemplate: Validate active content against source materials and identify inaccuracies, unsupported claims, and update opportunities.
